name: subvibe
description: Delegate well-scoped subtasks from Codex to a cheap subagent CLI (Grok Build by default; Antigravity/Gemini included), with cost discipline and verification gates.

interface.shortDescription: Use a cheap coding CLI (grok, agy, …) as a subagent
interface.longDescription: Routes deterministic, high-volume work (scaffolding, test generation, migrations, bulk reads, web research) from Codex to a cheaper subagent CLI (Grok Build by default; Antigravity/Gemini included) via a hardened driver-based wrapper with tiers, background jobs, structured failure codes, digest guards, and verification gates. Codex keeps the judgement-heavy 20%.
defaultPrompt: Use subvibe-delegate to generate exhaustive unit tests for this module.
Use subvibe-research to run a cited multi-source research pass on this topic.
